root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not doubting the Sword Princess's skills, but now it's a race against time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll handle this side. Miss Mina, you take the building on the other side!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sigh... I don't even know anymore.
